function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_integration_multiperiph.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_integration_multiperiph
description: >
  System-level integration tests for mspm33c321a_derivative exercising
  multiple peripherals simultaneously and in pipeline. Tests cover:
  concurrent UART0 + SPI0 + I2C0 operation without bus interference,
  DMA-assisted end-to-end UART transmission, AES-128 encryption followed
  by CRC-32 of the ciphertext matched against a precomputed reference,
  and GPIO edge event triggering a DMA transfer with completion IRQ.
checklist_ids:
  - INT-02
  - INT-03
  - INT-04
  - INT-05
test_names:
  - test_int_multiperiph_concurrent
  - test_int_dma_uart_e2e
  - test_int_aes_crc_pipeline
  - test_int_gpio_dma_trigger
priority: P1
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

flash_image:
  hex_file: verification/fw/xip_boot_smoke.hex
  base_addr: 0x00000000
  size_bytes: 0x00080000

external_devices:
  - name: uart_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart0_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart0_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: spi_slave_model
    type: spi_slave
    connect:
      sclk: spi0_sclk
      mosi: spi0_mosi
      miso: spi0_miso
      nss:  spi0_nss
    params:
      cpol: 0
      cpha: 0
      frame_bits: 8
      loopback: true
  - name: i2c_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c0_sda
      scl: i2c0_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x50
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000
  - name: jtag_probe_model
    type: gpio_stimulus
    connect:
      stimulus_out: gpioa_in[0]
    params:
      pulse_width_ns: 200
      assert_polarity: high

# ── INT-02: Concurrent UART0 + SPI0 + I2C0 ───────────────────────────────
concurrent_test:
  uart_byte: 0xA5
  spi_word:  0xC3
  i2c_addr:  0x50
  i2c_data:  0x77

# ── INT-04: AES+CRC pipeline reference values ─────────────────────────────
aes_crc_pipeline:
  aes_key:       [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
                  0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
  plaintext:     [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
                  0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
  expected_ct:   [0x3A, 0xD7, 0x7B, 0xB4, 0x0D, 0x7A, 0x36, 0x60,
                  0xA8, 0x9E, 0xCA, 0xF3, 0x24, 0x66, 0xEF, 0x97]
  expected_crc32: 0x4A3F9B2C    # CRC-32 of 16-byte ciphertext (pre-computed)

stimulus:
  # ── INT-02: Multi-peripheral concurrent ────────────────────────────────
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; all peripherals in idle state
  - step: 2
    action: configure_uart0
    baud_rate: 115200
    description: Configure UART0
  - step: 3
    action: configure_spi0
    mode: 0
    frame_bits: 8
    description: Configure SPI0
  - step: 4
    action: configure_i2c0
    speed: 100000
    description: Configure I2C0
  - step: 5
    action: launch_concurrent
    description: >
      Simultaneously:
        a) Write 0xA5 to UART0 TX FIFO
        b) Initiate SPI0 transfer of 0xC3
        c) Initiate I2C0 write of 0x77 to slave 0x50
  - step: 6
    action: wait_all_complete
    timeout_cycles: 50000
    description: Wait for UART TX-empty, SPI done, and I2C transfer-complete IRQs
  - step: 7
    action: verify_concurrent_results
    uart_rx_expected: 0xA5
    spi_rx_expected: 0xC3
    i2c_read_addr: 0x50
    i2c_read_reg: 0x00
    i2c_expected: 0x77
    description: Verify all three peripheral operations completed correctly

  # ── INT-03: DMA-assisted UART TX end-to-end ────────────────────────────
  - step: 8
    action: fill_sram
    addr: 0x20004000
    size: 16
    data: [0x48, 0x65, 0x6C, 0x6C, 0x6F, 0x20, 0x4E, 0x43,
           0x21, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00]
    description: Write "Hello NC!" string to SRAM for DMA-assisted UART TX
  - step: 9
    action: configure_dma_uart_tx
    dma_channel: 3
    src_addr: 0x20004000
    uart_instance: UART0
    length: 9
    description: Configure DMA channel 3 for M2P to UART0 TX
  - step: 10
    action: enable_dma_channel
    channel: 3
    description: Start DMA UART TX transfer
  - step: 11
    action: wait_uart_model_receive
    device: uart_model
    expected_bytes: [0x48, 0x65, 0x6C, 0x6C, 0x6F, 0x20, 0x4E, 0x43, 0x21]
    timeout_cycles: 200000
    description: uart_model captures all 9 bytes; verifies order and content

  # ── INT-04: AES → CRC pipeline ─────────────────────────────────────────
  - step: 12
    action: load_sram
    addr: 0x20005000
    data: [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
           0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    description: Place plaintext at 0x20005000
  - step: 13
    action: configure_aes
    key: [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
          0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
    mode: ECB
    operation: ENCRYPT
    src_addr: 0x20005000
    dst_addr: 0x20005010
    description: Encrypt plaintext block via AES-128 ECB
  - step: 14
    action: wait_aes_done
    timeout_cycles: 500
    description: Wait for AES done IRQ
  - step: 15
    action: compute_crc32_over_block
    addr: 0x20005010
    length: 16
    description: Feed 16-byte ciphertext into CRC-32 accelerator
  - step: 16
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: RESULT
    expected: 0x4A3F9B2C
    description: Verify CRC-32 over ciphertext matches pre-computed reference

  # ── INT-05: GPIO edge → DMA trigger ────────────────────────────────────
  - step: 17
    action: fill_sram
    addr: 0x20006000
    size: 64
    pattern: INCREMENTING
    description: Fill DMA source buffer at 0x20006000
  - step: 18
    action: configure_gpio_dma_trigger
    gpio_port: GPIOA
    gpio_pin: 0
    edge: rising
    dma_channel: 4
    dma_src: 0x20006000
    dma_dst: 0x20007000
    dma_len: 64
    description: Configure GPIOA[0] rising edge to trigger DMA channel 4
  - step: 19
    action: drive_gpio_stimulus
    device: jtag_probe_model
    description: Assert GPIOA[0] rising edge via gpio_stimulus model
  - step: 20
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 20
    timeout_cycles: 50000
    description: Wait for DMA transfer-complete IRQ (IRQ20)
  - step: 21
    action: compare_memory
    src_addr: 0x20006000
    dst_addr: 0x20007000
    size: 64
    description: Verify DMA destination matches source

checks:
  - id: CHK-INT-02
    checklist_id: INT-02
    description: All three peripherals (UART0, SPI0, I2C0) complete their operations concurrently without interference
    expected: All three operations return correct data; no APB or protocol errors
  - id: CHK-INT-03
    checklist_id: INT-03
    description: DMA pushes "Hello NC!" string through UART0 TX; uart_model receives all 9 bytes in order
    expected: uart_model captured bytes match source buffer exactly
  - id: CHK-INT-04
    checklist_id: INT-04
    description: AES-128 ciphertext CRC-32 result matches pre-computed reference 0x4A3F9B2C
    expected: CRC0.RESULT == 0x4A3F9B2C
  - id: CHK-INT-05
    checklist_id: INT-05
    description: GPIO edge triggers DMA transfer; destination buffer matches source
    expected: DMA completes; SRAM comparison passes; IRQ20 asserted

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-INT checks PASS
  - No bus contention or APB arbitration errors during concurrent test
  - uart_model reports no framing errors during DMA TX test
  - AES KAT and CRC reference match bit-exactly
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

extras.new_content:
scenario_name: scenario_integration_multiperiph
description: >
  System-level integration tests for mspm33c321a_derivative exercising
  multiple peripherals simultaneously and in pipeline. Tests cover:
  concurrent UART0 + SPI0 + I2C0 operation without bus interference,
  DMA-assisted end-to-end UART transmission, AES-128 encryption followed
  by CRC-32 of the ciphertext matched against a precomputed reference,
  and GPIO edge event triggering a DMA transfer with completion IRQ.
checklist_ids:
  - INT-02
  - INT-03
  - INT-04
  - INT-05
test_names:
  - test_int_multiperiph_concurrent
  - test_int_dma_uart_e2e
  - test_int_aes_crc_pipeline
  - test_int_gpio_dma_trigger
priority: P1
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

flash_image:
  hex_file: verification/fw/xip_boot_smoke.hex
  base_addr: 0x00000000
  size_bytes: 0x00080000

external_devices:
  - name: uart_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart0_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart0_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: spi_slave_model
    type: spi_slave
    connect:
      sclk: spi0_sclk
      mosi: spi0_mosi
      miso: spi0_miso
      nss:  spi0_nss
    params:
      cpol: 0
      cpha: 0
      frame_bits: 8
      loopback: true
  - name: i2c_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c0_sda
      scl: i2c0_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x50
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000
  - name: jtag_probe_model
    type: gpio_stimulus
    connect:
      stimulus_out: gpioa_in[0]
    params:
      pulse_width_ns: 200
      assert_polarity: high

# ── INT-02: Concurrent UART0 + SPI0 + I2C0 ───────────────────────────────
concurrent_test:
  uart_byte: 0xA5

  i2c_addr:  0x50
  i2c_data:  0x77

# ── INT-04: AES+CRC pipeline reference values ─────────────────────────────
aes_crc_pipeline:
  aes_key:       [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
                  0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
  plaintext:     [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
                  0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
  expected_ct:   [0x3A, 0xD7, 0x7B, 0xB4, 0x0D, 0x7A, 0x36, 0x60,
                  0xA8, 0x9E, 0xCA, 0xF3, 0x24, 0x66, 0xEF, 0x97]
  expected_crc32: 0x4A3F9B2C    # CRC-32 of 16-byte ciphertext (pre-computed)

stimulus:
  # ── INT-02: Multi-peripheral concurrent ────────────────────────────────
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; all peripherals in idle state
  - step: 2
    action: configure_uart0
    baud_rate: 115200
    description: Configure UART0
  - step: 3
    action: configure_spi0
    mode: 0
    frame_bits: 8
    description: Configure SPI0
  - step: 4
    action: configure_i2c0
    speed: 100000
    description: Configure I2C0
  - step: 5
    action: launch_concurrent
    description: >
      Simultaneously:
        a) Write 0xA5 to UART0 TX FIFO
        b) Initiate SPI0 transfer of 0xC3
        c) Initiate I2C0 write of 0x77 to slave 0x50
  - step: 6
    action: wait_all_complete
    timeout_cycles: 50000
    description: Wait for UART TX-empty, SPI done, and I2C transfer-complete IRQs
  - step: 7

    uart_rx_expected: 0xA5
    spi_rx_expected: 0xC3
    i2c_read_addr: 0x50
    i2c_read_reg: 0x00
    i2c_expected: 0x77
    description: Verify all three peripheral operations completed correctly

  # ── INT-03: DMA-assisted UART TX end-to-end ────────────────────────────
  - step: 8
    action: fill_sram
    addr: 0x20004000
    size: 16
    data: [0x48, 0x65, 0x6C, 0x6C, 0x6F, 0x20, 0x4E, 0x43,
           0x21, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00]
    description: Write "Hello NC!" string to SRAM for DMA-assisted UART TX
  - step: 9
    action: configure_dma_uart_tx
    dma_channel: 3
    src_addr: 0x20004000
    uart_instance: UART0
    length: 9
    description: Configure DMA channel 3 for M2P to UART0 TX
  - step: 10
    action: enable_dma_channel
    channel: 3
    description: Start DMA UART TX transfer
  - step: 11
    action: wait_uart_model_receive
    device: uart_model
    expected_bytes: [0x48, 0x65, 0x6C, 0x6C, 0x6F, 0x20, 0x4E, 0x43, 0x21]
    timeout_cycles: 200000
    description: uart_model captures all 9 bytes; verifies order and content

  # ── INT-04: AES → CRC pipeline ─────────────────────────────────────────
  - step: 12
    action: load_sram
    addr: 0x20005000
    data: [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
           0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    description: Place plaintext at 0x20005000
  - step: 13
    action: configure_aes
    key: [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
          0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
    mode: ECB
    operation: ENCRYPT
    src_addr: 0x20005000
    dst_addr: 0x20005010
    description: Encrypt plaintext block via AES-128 ECB
  - step: 14
    action: wait_aes_done
    timeout_cycles: 500
    description: Wait for AES done IRQ
  - step: 15
    action: compute_crc32_over_block
    addr: 0x20005010
    length: 16
    description: Feed 16-byte ciphertext into CRC-32 accelerator
  - step: 16
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: RESULT
    expected: 0x4A3F9B2C
    description: Verify CRC-32 over ciphertext matches pre-computed reference

  # ── INT-05: GPIO edge → DMA trigger ────────────────────────────────────
  - step: 17
    action: fill_sram
    addr: 0x20006000
    size: 64
    pattern: INCREMENTING
    description: Fill DMA source buffer at 0x20006000
  - step: 18
    action: configure_gpio_dma_trigger
    gpio_port: GPIOA
    gpio_pin: 0
    edge: rising
    dma_channel: 4
    dma_src: 0x20006000
    dma_dst: 0x20007000
    dma_len: 64
    description: Configure GPIOA[0] rising edge to trigger DMA channel 4
  - step: 19
    action: drive_gpio_stimulus
    device: jtag_probe_model
    description: Assert GPIOA[0] rising edge via gpio_stimulus model
  - step: 20
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 20
    timeout_cycles: 50000
    description: Wait for DMA transfer-complete IRQ (IRQ20)
  - step: 21
    action: compare_memory
    src_addr: 0x20006000
    dst_addr: 0x20007000
    size: 64
    description: Verify DMA destination matches source

checks:
  - id: CHK-INT-02
    checklist_id: INT-02
    description: All three peripherals (UART0, SPI0, I2C0) complete their operations concurrently without interference
    expected: All three operations return correct data; no APB or protocol errors
  - id: CHK-INT-03
    checklist_id: INT-03
    description: DMA pushes "Hello NC!" string through UART0 TX; uart_model receives all 9 bytes in order
    expected: uart_model captured bytes match source buffer exactly
  - id: CHK-INT-04
    checklist_id: INT-04
    description: AES-128 ciphertext CRC-32 result matches pre-computed reference 0x4A3F9B2C
    expected: CRC0.RESULT == 0x4A3F9B2C
  - id: CHK-INT-05
    checklist_id: INT-05
    description: GPIO edge triggers DMA transfer; destination buffer matches source
    expected: DMA completes; SRAM comparison passes; IRQ20 asserted

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-INT checks PASS
  - No bus contention or APB arbitration errors during concurrent test
  - uart_model reports no framing errors during DMA TX test
  - AES KAT and CRC reference match bit-exactly
